name: Ops Dash Connector
author: Legacy Sales Engineering
changelog: 1.7.3 — update checks: a manual Check Again on Dashboard → Updates now sees new releases immediately (manifest cache busted on forced checks; routine cache 1h). 1.7.2 — llms.txt endpoint: Ops Dash can publish/refresh an llms.txt (AI-assistant site summary) as a physical file at the web root, with one-time backup of any pre-existing file. 1.7.1 — robots.txt fixes now work even when a physical robots.txt exists at the web root: the original file is backed up once and the managed rules are written into it; resetting to the WordPress default restores the backup. Clear warnings when the file is not writable. 1.7.0 — One-code pairing: connect a site by typing an 8-character code from Ops Dash instead of copying the long key; the plugin exchanges the code for the key automatically. Manual key entry moved to Advanced. 1.6.x — packaging + self-heal fixes, self-updating, robots.txt-sitemap-heading fixes.
